column1: # Motorola 6809 + Hitachi 6309 assembly syntax definition for tedit.
# Covers all 6809 opcodes (including alias mnemonics ASL=LSL
# BLO=BCS and the full set of long-branch LBXX forms) plus every
# documented 6309 extension opcode and common assembler directives.
# The combined keyword count exceeds the old HL_MAX_KEYWORDS default of 128.
# hl.h has been updated to 256 to accommodate this file.
# $ prefix for hex ($FF) and % prefix for binary (%10101010) are
# recognised natively by the lexer without needing suffix config.
# Shift / rotate  (ASL is the historical alias for LSL; both are legal)

column2: F = 8-bit halves of W; Q = D:W 32-bit)

column1: # Immediate-to-memory logical ops  (AND/OR/EOR/AND-test direct or indexed)
# Bit-transfer between a register bit and a memory bit
# E / F / W / D register: clear
# E / F / W / D register: increment / decrement
# E / F / W register: shift / rotate
# D register: logical shift (pseudo-mnemonics accepted by most assemblers)
# Stack: push/pull the W register pair
# 6309: E and F are the 8-bit halves of W; W pairs with D to form Q (32-bit)
